title: sterculia kingtungensis
intro: Sterculia kingtungensis, also known as the King Tung tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The extracts from the plant have been found to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Sterculia kingtungensis include infusions, decoctions, and tablets, which are used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
